_source: Community meta approximation for Repentance-era play (isaacranks.com vote trends + widely-shared community tier lists), curated 2026-07-14. Inherently subjective — edit freely; the scraper re-merges on every run.
_fallback: Items not listed here derive their tier from the in-game Repentance quality: q4→S, q3→A, q2→B, q1→C, q0→D. Trinkets (no quality) stay untiered unless listed.
